_comment: Aura RTDB Security Rules. Roadmap N-2. Deploy via `firebase deploy --only database`.
_comment2: Source of truth for community moderation authorization. Mirrors the client-side VoteRepository.isAdmin check but is the actual enforcement layer (client checks are spoofable on rooted devices).
_comment3: All admin actions are gated on `auth.token.admin === true` — a Custom Claim set via Firebase Admin SDK from a trusted backend (Cloud Function, Cloud Run, or one-off script). Grant a UID with `admin.auth().setCustomUserClaims(uid, { admin: true })`.

voters._comment: Legacy path kept for backward compatibility with installs that read it directly.

$contentId._comment: Only Custom-Claim admins can globally hide a piece of content.

$uploadId..write: auth != null && (!data.exists() || data.child('uploaderUid').val() === auth.uid || auth.token.admin === true)
auth != null && (!data.exists() || data.child('uploaderUid').val() === auth.uid || auth.token.admin === true)

collection_shares._comment: Shareable-collection JSON payloads exposed via aura://collection/import/{token}.

$token..write: auth != null && (!data.exists() || data.child('createdByUid').val() === auth.uid || auth.token.admin === true)
